//: Single root package ON PURPOSE: the platform releases as one vX.Y.Z
tag (ArgoCD targetRevision, whole image set promoted together).
Per-component packages would break the one-tag-one-deployable-state
contract. The desktop images are out of scope: waas-images is its
Chart.yaml is bumped via the x-release-please-start-version/end
block markers (generic updater; the 'v' in appVersion survives
because the version regex only matches the numeric part).
